name: white_gold_grail
description: Holy artifact — the sacred chalice said to grant eternal life to the mortal world.

name: holy_jaw
description: Mythic relic — the preserved teeth of Saint Anthony, believed to speak divine truth.

name: enima
description: Legendary weapon — the Spear of Fate, true to behold decide the destiny of whoever it pierces.

name: shroud_of_turin
description: Holy relic — the burial cloth bearing the image of Christ.

name: anti_material_gun
description: massive holy gun carry by the Communicant anti-tank hunter, using thrice-blessed 50mm anti-armor shells they have carried on their belts or by Mendelist monks who accompany them.

name: shrine_anchorite
description: A colossal suit of machine armour fuelled by diesel and faith, a malevolent weapon draped in holy iconography and weeping gore, emerges to unleash a symphony of slaughter, where the wretched union of man and machine heralds the demise of all who oppose the Almighty.
